invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破0.091（收紧支撑）或融资费率转正超过0.005%，则趋势跟随剧本失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidation if price breaks below 0.091 (tightened support) or funding rate turns positive above 0.005%, negating the trend following scenario.

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破1800（日线支撑）或融资费率转正超过-0.002%，则轧空剧本失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidation if price breaks below 1800 (daily support) or funding rate turns positive above -0.002%, negating the short squeeze scenario.
